title: evonymoides scandens
intro: Evonymoides scandens, also known as the climbing barberry or American wahoo, is a woody vine native to eastern North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Evonymoides scandens include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as providing relief from digestive issues and respiratory problems. Evonymoides scandens can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in traditional herbal medicine to make a root bark extract.
